q.en: Where does the story take place?

options.en: A school classroom according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一间教室（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A cave
options.zh: 一个洞穴

options.en: A library in the town of Porter's Mill
options.zh: 波特磨坊镇的一家图书馆

options.en: A park
options.zh: 一个公园

explain.en: The book opens with Sarah whining, 'It's Saturday afternoon... why are we spending it at the library?' in Porter's Mill.
explain.zh: 书中开头莎拉抱怨：“现在是周六下午……我们为什么要在图书馆里度过？”地点是波特磨坊镇的图书馆。

q.en: Why do Sarah, Qynn, and Jake go to the library?
q.zh: 莎拉、Qynn 和 Jake 为什么去图书馆？

options.en: To return books only
options.zh: 只是为了还书

options.en: To research the strange events happening around town
options.zh: 去调查镇上发生的怪事

options.en: To attend a birthday party according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 去参加生日派对（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To meet Mr. Himmel
options.zh: 去见 Himmel 先生

explain.en: Qynn says they need help 'exploring local history' and asks about 'historical records of strange events happening around town.'
explain.zh: Qynn 说他们需要帮助“探索当地历史”，并询问镇上“奇怪事件的历史记录”。

q.en: What is 'the tome' the librarian is searching for?
q.zh: 图书管理员寻找的“tome（大部头）”是什么？

options.en: A treasure map
options.zh: 一张藏宝图

options.en: A large old book titled 'Porter's Mill: A History'
options.zh: 一本名为《波特磨坊史》的古老大书

options.en: A daily newspaper
options.zh: 一份日报

options.en: A small notebook according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一本小笔记本（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The librarian says the missing tome is 'Porter's Mill: A History by John Porter III,' and that book later falls off a shelf in the attic.
explain.zh: 管理员说丢失的大部头是《约翰·波特三世所著的波特磨坊史》，后来这本书从阁楼的架子上掉了下来。

q.en: In the glossary, the word 'tome' means...

options.en: A large, thick, usually old book
options.zh: 一本大而厚的、通常很旧的书

options.en: A hidden message
options.zh: 一个隐藏的信息

options.en: A small household tool according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一件小工具（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A type of bird
options.zh: 一种鸟

explain.en: The glossary defines 'tome (n.)' as 'a large, thick, usually old book (p. 6).'
explain.zh: 词汇表把 tome 定义为“一本大而厚的、通常很旧的书（第6页）”。

q.en: When Qynn says it is time to be 'proactive,' what does that word mean?
q.zh: 当 Qynn 说该变得“proactive（主动）”时，这个词是什么意思？

options.en: Making something happen to control a situation
options.zh: 主动采取行动以掌控局面

options.en: Falling asleep
options.zh: 睡着

options.en: Hiding from danger according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 躲避危险（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Being lazy
options.zh: 偷懒

explain.en: The glossary defines 'proactive (adj.)' as 'making something happen to control a situation or prepare for future situations (p. 7).'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 proactive 定义为“主动采取行动以掌控局面或为将来做准备（第7页）”。

q.en: How do Sarah and Qynn get up to the attic?
q.zh: 莎拉和 Qynn 是怎么上到阁楼的？

options.en: The librarian shows them the way
options.zh: 图书管理员给他们领路

options.en: Mr. Himmel lets them in
options.zh: Himmel 先生让他们进去

options.en: They walk through the front door openly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们光明正大地从前门走进去（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Jake distracts the librarian while they sneak up the stairs
options.zh: Jake 引开管理员，他们偷偷溜上楼

explain.en: The text says 'Jake... keeps her attention long enough for us to sneak up the stairs' past the 'Authorized Personnel Only' sign.
explain.zh: 文中写道：“Jake……一直吸引着她的注意力，足以让我们偷偷溜上楼”，绕过“仅限授权人员”的牌子。

q.en: What happens to the heavy history book at the end of the attic scene?
q.zh: 在阁楼场景的结尾，那本沉重的历史书发生了什么？

options.en: It falls to the floor near Sarah
options.zh: 它掉到莎拉旁边的地板上

options.en: It stays on the shelf
options.zh: 它一直留在架子上

options.en: The librarian takes it away according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 管理员把它拿走了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Jake carries it outside
options.zh: Jake 把它搬到了外面

explain.en: A loud thump leads Qynn back up to find 'Sarah, terrified, staring at a large book on the floor.'
explain.zh: 一声巨响后，Qynn 跑回去发现“莎拉惊恐地盯着地板上的一本大书”。

q.en: The book includes a glossary and a reading-level chart (Fountas & Pinnell, DRA). This shows it is...
q.zh: 书中包含词汇表和阅读级别表（Fountas & Pinnell、DRA）。这说明它属于……

options.en: A college textbook series according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 大学教材系列（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A leveled reading program (Reading A-Z)
options.zh: 分级阅读项目（Reading A-Z）

options.en: A daily newspaper
options.zh: 一份日报

options.en: A poetry collection
options.zh: 一本诗集

explain.en: The back matter lists 'Level S Leveled Book © Learning A-Z' and a correlation chart, marking it as a Reading A-Z leveled book.
explain.zh: 书末标注“Level S Leveled Book © Learning A-Z”以及对应级别表，说明它是 Reading A-Z 的分级读物。

q.en: The author most likely wrote this story to...
q.zh: 作者写这个故事最可能的目的是……

options.en: Explain how libraries are run
options.zh: 解释图书馆如何运作

options.en: Teach the reader math
options.zh: 教读者数学

options.en: Give a full history of Porter's Mill according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 完整讲述波特磨坊的历史（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Entertain readers with a mystery about kids investigating strange events
options.zh: 用孩子们调查怪异事件的悬疑故事娱乐读者

explain.en: It is a fictional adventure where the kids sneak into an attic to find a missing book about town mysteries, meant to entertain.
explain.zh: 这是一则虚构冒险故事，孩子们潜入阁楼寻找一本关于小镇秘事的失踪之书，目的是娱乐读者。

q.en: The title 'Finding the Tome' refers to...
q.zh: 标题《寻找失落的史书》指的是……

options.en: Finding a lost dog
options.zh: 找到一条走失的狗

options.en: Finding a treasure map according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 找到一张藏宝图（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The kids finding the missing large history book in the attic
options.zh: 孩子们在阁楼里找到那本失踪的古老大书

options.en: Finding the librarian
options.zh: 找到图书管理员

explain.en: The whole plot revolves around locating the missing 'Porter's Mill: A History' tome, which they finally find in the attic.
explain.zh: 整个情节都围绕寻找失踪的《波特磨坊史》展开，最终他们在阁楼找到了它。

prompt.en: Draw a map of the library showing the path the kids took: the front counter, the 'Authorized Personnel Only' stairs, and the dusty attic room where they found the book.
prompt.zh: 画一张图书馆地图，标出孩子们走过的路线：前台、写着“仅限授权人员”的楼梯，以及他们找到书的布满灰尘的阁楼房间。

en: Start at the counter where they talk to the librarian.
Mark the hidden stairs behind the desk and the attic at the top.
zh: 从他们和管理员说话的前台开始画起。
标出桌子后面隐藏的楼梯以及顶部的阁楼。
